params.name: Twelve Tables
params.description:
On Jul 3, 449 BC, the earliest legal documents of ancient Rome were finally revised.

After a long war, the plebeians of Rome forced the nobles to form the Decemviri and establish statutory laws. These laws were then engraved on the Twelve Tables. It was written based on the old customary laws that protect the interests of patricians, but also added laws to restrict their power to interpret the law as they please.

[Famous Quotes of the Twelve Tables]
